name: Can I get workers comp if my illness started after I left my job in Saint George?
description: Yes, for occupational diseases manifesting later.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if my illness started after I left my job in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, for occupational diseases manifesting later.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if symptoms manifest after leaving but stem from prior work exposure, like gradual occupational diseases.[3] Idaho and Utah recognize post-employment claims if work caused the condition.[3] Key factors: (1) medical proof of work origin; (2) no new intervening causes; (3) filed timely from disablement. Gather old employment records and new diagnostics. File with state commission promptly. Lawyer helps prove nexus despite gap.
